narrative.description: Celeste is a precision platformer about climbing a mountain through tight rooms, with optional assist modes for accessibility.
narrative.core_loop: Navigate hazard-filled rooms, master dash and jump timing, reach checkpoints, and climb chapter-based stages toward the summit.

mechanics.map_notes: In Celeste, a character locomotion system in which movement responds immediately and exactly to player input, with no acceleration ramp-up, momentum carry, or analog smoothing.
mechanics.expression: In Celeste, a character locomotion system in which movement responds immediately and exactly to player input, with no acceleration ramp-up, momentum carry, or analog smoothing.

mechanics.map_notes: In Celeste, optional modifiers reduce difficulty spikes for players who want narrative focus.
mechanics.expression: In Celeste, optional modifiers reduce difficulty spikes for players who want narrative focus.

mechanics.map_notes: In Celeste, a traversal mechanic in which the level space contains persistent damaging or lethal obstacles that the player must avoid through precise movement.
mechanics.expression: In Celeste, a traversal mechanic in which the level space contains persistent damaging or lethal obstacles that the player must avoid through precise movement.

mechanics.map_notes: In Celeste, a save point within a stage resets the player to that position on death rather than restarting the entire level.
mechanics.expression: In Celeste, a save point within a stage resets the player to that position on death rather than restarting the entire level.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Celeste through its core platformer loop.
